equal.label: Equal split
equal.description: Five equal partners. This is what maximum diversification looks like in a five-bar example.

dominant.label: One dominant
dominant.description: A single dominant partner pulls the effective number down even when the others still matter.

india_fy25.label: India FY25
india_fy25.description: India’s top five export partners in FY25. Because the widget only shows five bars, the visible shares are rescaled to 100% in the frontend.
